title: Card view - Column type sort is broken, Allow re-ordering of columns when fixed
excerpt: Hi - In the card view board tab, you can select which columns to show in the cards, but they automatically sort all of the status column on top, with everything below that, even though that is not the order on the main t…

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - In the card view board tab, you can select which columns to show in the cards, but they automatically sort all of the status column on top, with everything below that, even though that is not the order on the main tab. This is not expected behavior to me, as I would expect them to be in the order that they appear on the main tab.
Additionally, there should be a way to re-order and save the columns order in the card view tab itself.
